name: Crab Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the crabmeat.
2. Cook the onion, celery, green pepper, and garlic in fat until tender.
3. Combine the bread cubes, eggs, parsley, salt, pepper, cooked vegetables, and crabmeat.
4. Mix well.
5. Fill crab shells with the mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes. This can also be used as a casserole.
